content:
RORK — FIX RENDER REPO PIN + DEPLOY LIVE NOW

OWNER DIRECTIVE:
Fix the final deployment blocker now. No other tasks.

ROOT ISSUE:
GitHub has the latest IVX code, but Render is still serving old commit because Render is pinned/connected to the wrong or deleted old repo.

DO NOW:

1. Open Render service:
ivx-holdings-platform

2. Go to:
Settings → Build & Deploy

3. Fix source repo:
Disconnect old/deleted repo.
Connect:
@[github:https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fibb142%2Frork-global-real-estate-invest:GitHub Sync - ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest]

Branch:
main

Auto Deploy:
ON

4. Trigger:
Manual Deploy → Deploy latest commit

5. Wait until deployment finishes.

6. Verify production:
- GET https://api.ivxholding.com/health
- GET https://api.ivxholding.com/version
- Confirm live commit SHA equals GitHub main SHA.

7. Verify app:
- https://ivxholding.com → 200
- https://chat.ivxholding.com → 200
- Owner login works
- IVX IA Senior Developer works
- Enterprise Access routes do not return 404

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

RENDER_CONNECTED_REPO:
RENDER_BRANCH:
AUTO_DEPLOY:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
PRODUCTION_COMMIT_MATCH:
OWNER_LOGIN_STATUS:
SENIOR_DEVELOPER_STATUS:
ENTERPRISE_ACCESS_STATUS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only when GitHub SHA = Render SHA = /health SHA.
